com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Class CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    CopyAttributes

    public static class CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder
extends CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder>
    Builder for creating CopyAttributes configured for regular copy including scanning and printing.
    Since:
    API 3

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CopyBuilder()
      Construct a new Builder for regular copy job.

      Combine all of the attributes in this into a CopyAttributes object.

    • Method Detail

      • build

        public CopyAttributes build(CopyAttributesCaps caps)
                     throws CapabilitiesExceededException
        Combine all of the attributes in this into a CopyAttributes object.
        Specified by:
        build in class CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder>
        Parameters:
        caps - The copy capabilities supported by the printer.
        Returns:
        a CopyAttributes object containing all of the attributes supported by the device.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if caps does not contain the set attribute value.
        Since:
        API 3
